home.headline: For those who demand clarity and seek consistent results. Discreet online therapy worldwide.
home.aboutExperience: I’m a clinical psychologist focused on clarity, precision, and real change.
home.therapyPrinciples: For adults seeking a structured process with discretion, clarity, and continuous technical support.

therapy.title: Therapy
therapy.description: Structured clinical care for adults anywhere in the world.
therapy.forWho1: Adults dealing with anxiety, depression, or persistent patterns of emotional suffering;
therapy.forWho2: Clients seeking a structured process to develop autonomy and psychological stability;
therapy.forWho3: Those wishing to improve the quality of their personal and professional relationships;
therapy.forWho4: People facing stressful or high-pressure life contexts;
therapy.forWho5: Immigrants in the process of cultural or professional adaptation worldwide.
therapy.onlineDescription: Online sessions allow for effective therapy with greater comfort, flexibility, and discretion.
therapy.onlineSubtitle: For adults with a busy work routine or living abroad, the online format offers:
therapy.online1: Schedule flexibility in all time zones;
therapy.online4: A safe, discreet, and confidential environment.
therapy.onlineEffectiveness: Technical quality and effectiveness are preserved, following the same clinical criteria applied in in-person sessions.
therapy.step1Desc: First step to investigate your demands, needs, and goals.
therapy.step2Desc: Together, we define treatment goals in a **clear and measurable** way.
therapy.step3Desc: Structured sessions using scientifically grounded and highly personalised models of psychotherapy.
therapy.step4Desc: Progress tracking on each session and refinements aiming towards our goal.
therapy.step5Desc: When goals are achieved, we make a relapse prevention plan, test it, then conclude the treatment.

about.title: About
about.description: Learn about my background, experience, and care principles.
about.formation: I am a clinical psychologist dedicated to structured, results-oriented interventions. I combine rigorous scientific evidence with a highly individualized process to help clients achieve meaningful and measurable outcomes.
about.experience: I conduct therapeutic processes with careful assessment, defined methodology, and continuous technical support, serving adults in Brazil and abroad.
about.research: I also work as a researcher and master's student in Psychology, integrating scientific production and clinical practice with rigor and constant updating.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Answers to common questions about psychotherapy and my practice.
faq.contactHere: If in doubt, contact me here.
faq.q1: How do I schedule my first appointment?
faq.a1: You can send me a message on WhatsApp. We will schedule your appointment as soon as possible.
faq.a2: The first session (assessment) lasts between one and two hours. Subsequent sessions last 50 minutes.
faq.q3: How is the confidentiality of my data ensured?
faq.a3: All data is stored and protected according to the General Data Protection Law (Law No. 13,709/2018) and the regulations of the Federal Council of Psychology.
faq.q4: How long does the treatment last?
faq.a4: Therapy should last the minimum necessary for goals to be effectively achieved. You will receive a plan with the expected duration at the beginning of treatment.
faq.q5: When is online therapy not recommended?
faq.a5: Online therapy may be less effective in cases of severe psychotic symptoms, constant life risks, and severe OCD. Except for these cases, scientific evidence points to similar effectiveness as in-person treatment.
